subject: Mechanical Building Budget
body:
Emad communicated your request that a budget to you for your approval before
commitments to vendors or contractors are made. Enclosed is a budget
estimate for the entire building and adjacent site and utility work. Charles
has come here to assist in its preparation. Charles, Bill and I are  here
and all of us are prepared to review it with you should you wish to do so.
Dan reviewed the budget estimate and is prepared to discuss it with you on
island. We request that the budget estimate be approved and that we be
authorized to proceed with the TSG award in particular since we face the
large price increases in that purchase should it be delayed.  We have left
hard copy of this message and a copy of the budget estimate at FTC as we
understand that you may come into the office today.  We have put an approval
block below where you can indicate your approval on the hard copy.  

 

 

 

Approved ______________

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)
body_html:
Emad communicated your request that a budget to you for your approval before commitments to vendors or contractors are made. Enclosed is a budget estimate for the entire building and adjacent site and utility work. Charles has come here to assist in its preparation. Charles, Bill and I are  here and all of us are prepared to review it with you should you wish to do so. Dan reviewed the budget estimate and is prepared to discuss it with you on island. We request that the budget estimate be approved and that we be authorized to proceed with the TSG award in particular since we face the large price increases in that purchase should it be delayed.  We have left hard copy of this message and a copy of the budget estimate at FTC as we understand that you may come into the office today.  We have put an approval block below where you can indicate your approval on the hard copy.  

 

 

 

Approved ______________
